other_observers: Jim Schmoker was with me. Joe La Fleur reported it on 10/22 as well. Many other observers between 27 May and 22 Oct.; Found 27 May by Nick Komar. Nick has photos:http://www.pbase.com/quetzal/brpe2006
description: Bill proportions and pouch unique to pelicans. Brown pelican by smaller size compared to nearby AWPEs, brown coloration on dorsal surfaces, dark bill. Aged as juvenile by white belly.Behaviors: Sleeping and preening on a floating tire.Call: not heardPlumage: Juvenile
